stream_samples.text: netflix on apple tv crashes every single time I try to switch profiles. tvOS 18.2, atv 4k 3rd gen. been like this for 2 weeks
Continue Watching is showing me shows I finished a month ago. Cleared the row 4 times, comes back. Beverly Hills Cop is haunting me.
[#PLAYER-7741 P1] audio drifts ~400ms behind video after the app is backgrounded for >30s on iOS. Repro on every iPhone 15 we tested.
the Netflix homepage recommendations have been *terrible* since last Tuesday. it's just true crime and reality TV no matter what I watch
Vizio M-Series Quantum is reporting Dolby Vision capability when it only supports HDR10. We're sending DV streams that the panel renders washed out.
tvOS player crash rate up 4.8x on profile-switch since 7.142 build. Apple TV 4K 3rd gen + tvOS 18.2 is the cohort. Crash signature is in the user-store deserialize path.
Audio out of sync with picture after I unlock my phone. Have to fully close and reopen the app to fix. Galaxy S24 Ultra.
Recommendations regression is real. The new model is showing me 90% of the same 30 titles in different rows. Diversity collapsed.
[#REC-2218] ad-tier user got the same Sour Patch Kids creative 8 times in one episode. Frequency cap appears broken on FAST channels.
Ad-tier creative load timeouts up 12% on Roku since the SSAI v3.2 rollout. Manifest stitcher is occasionally serving expired pre-roll URLs.
the new spatial audio mix on the Black Mirror season is incredible. genuinely impressed
is anyone else's Continue Watching just full of stuff they already finished? mine has 6 ghosts on it right now
[player-tvos] profile-switch crash repros when user-prefs blob exceeds 64KB. introduced in 7.142 by the watch-history payload increase.
Vizio OLED user reports Dolby Vision content looks gray and washed out. Forcing HDR10 in advanced settings fixes it. Capability mistag confirmed.
Recs model v4.1 collapsed catalog diversity score 0.71 -> 0.42 in A/B. Engagement is up 3% but D30 retention is flat to negative. Quality call needed.

clusters.title: tvOS profile-switch crash on Apple TV 4K (7.142)
Audio desync on iOS/Android after backgrounding
Dolby Vision mistag on Vizio panels
Ad-tier creative load failures on Roku (SSAI v3.2)

top_epic.title: Fix tvOS profile-switch crash on Apple TV 4K
top_epic.rationale: 2,640 signals concentrate on a single signature: the player crashes on profile switch when the user-prefs blob exceeds 64KB, introduced in 7.142 when the watch-history payload was expanded. tvOS player crash rate is up 4.8x on Apple TV 4K (3rd gen) running tvOS 18.2 — a high-LTV, high-visibility cohort. Profile switching is the entry point for every household session; losing it is functionally an outage for shared accounts.
top_epic.verdict: Player-critical — every household session opens with a profile switch.
top_epic.recommendation: Ship a 7.142.1 hotfix with a streaming user-prefs deserializer, cap the watch-history payload, and add a profile-switch crash SLO with paging.
acceptance_criteria: tvOS player switches to streaming user-prefs deserializer; tolerates blobs > 64KB without OOM/crash
Watch-history payload capped at 32KB on the wire; older entries paged in lazily on demand
Profile-switch crash rate on Apple TV 4K (3rd gen, tvOS 18.x) returns to under 0.05% per session
Profile-switch crash SLO wired to PagerDuty with a 0.1% p99 threshold over a 30-min window

evidence.quote: tvOS player crash rate up 4.8x on profile-switch since 7.142 build. Apple TV 4K 3rd gen + tvOS 18.2 cohort.
profile-switch crash repros when user-prefs blob exceeds 64KB. introduced in 7.142.
Netflix on Apple TV crashes every single time I try to switch profiles. tvOS 18.2.
